competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, England. Noni Madueke is caught offside.
Foul by Sander Berge (Norway).
Handball by Noni Madueke (England).
Corner, England. Conceded by Kristoffer Ajer.
Handball by Jude Bellingham (England).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Jude Bellingham (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 克里斯托弗·阿耶尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from outside the box is too high from a direct free kick.
Anthony Gordon (England) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt saved. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Julian Ryerson with a cross.

events.description: 哈兰德射正。 朱利安·瑞尔森参与进攻。

player.name: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Norway 1, England 0. Andreas Schjelderup (Norway) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard.

events.description: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普破门。 比分 1-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Nico O'Reilly (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Anthony Gordon (England).
Attempt missed. Alexander Sørloth (Norway) left footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Ørjan Nyland following a set piece situation.

events.description: 亚历山大·索罗斯射门偏出。 尼兰参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Martin Ødegaard (Norway) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Alexander Sørloth.

events.description: 厄德高射正。 亚历山大·索罗斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Anthony Gordon (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Alexander Sørloth (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard.

events.description: 亚历山大·索罗斯射门被封堵。 厄德高参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Torbjørn Heggem.
Attempt blocked. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射门被封堵。 德克兰·赖斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, England. Declan Rice is caught offside.
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Noni Madueke.

events.description: 萨卡替补登场，换下诺丽玛杜克。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Declan Rice.

events.description: 埃贝雷奇·埃兹替补登场，换下德克兰·赖斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Norway 1, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Anthony Gordon.

events.description: 贝林厄姆破门。 比分 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway).
Offside, England. Harry Kane is caught offside.
First Half ends, Norway 1, England 1.
Second Half begins Norway 1, England 1.
Harry Kane (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Eberechi Eze (England) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 埃贝雷奇·埃兹射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Eberechi Eze.

events.description: 萨卡射门被封堵。 埃贝雷奇·埃兹参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Jordan Pickford.
Attempt missed. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Julian Ryerson with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 哈兰德射门偏出。 朱利安·瑞尔森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Jordan Pickford.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by John Stones.
GOAL OVERTURNED BY VAR: Torbjørn Heggem (Norway) scores but the goal is ruled out after a VAR review.
VAR Decision: No Goal Norway 1-1 England.
Delay in match because of an injury Julian Ryerson (Norway).
Substitution, Norway. Fredrik Aursnes replaces Julian Ryerson because of an injury.

events.description: 弗雷德里克·奥斯内斯替补登场，换下朱利安·瑞尔森。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Jude Bellingham (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.

events.description: 奥斯卡·鲍布替补登场，换下亚历山大·索罗斯。

relatedPlayer.name: 安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Norway. Antonio Nusa replaces Andreas Schjelderup.

events.description: 安东尼奥·努萨替补登场，换下安德烈亚斯·谢尔德鲁普。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, England. Reece James replaces Anthony Gordon.

events.description: 里斯·詹姆斯替补登场，换下安东尼·哥顿。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Ezri Konsa.
Attempt missed. Fredrik Aursnes (Norway) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left following a corner.

events.description: 弗雷德里克·奥斯内斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Kristoffer Ajer (Norway) hits the bar with a header from the centre of the box. Assisted by Fredrik Aursnes following a corner.

events.description: 克里斯托弗·阿耶尔射门偏出。 弗雷德里克·奥斯内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Bukayo Saka.
Attempt saved. Antonio Nusa (Norway) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Sander Berge.

events.description: 安东尼奥·努萨射正。 桑德·伯格参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Nico O'Reilly.

events.description: 杰德·斯彭斯替补登场，换下尼科·奥雷利。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by David Møller Wolfe.
Foul by Harry Kane (England).
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Ezri Konsa.

events.description: 摩根·罗杰斯替补登场，换下埃兹里·康萨。

player.name: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces David Møller Wolfe.

events.description: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森替补登场，换下大卫·莫勒·沃尔夫。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces Torbjørn Heggem.

events.description: 莱奥·奥斯蒂高替补登场，换下托比昂·赫格姆。

qualifiers.espnText: Eberechi Eze (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时2分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Torbjørn Heggem (Norway).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Jude Bellingham (England) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by John Stones with a cross.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射门偏出。 约翰·斯通斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Eberechi Eze (England).
Delay in match because of an injury Jude Bellingham (England).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, England. Conceded by Marcus Pedersen.
Attempt saved. Harry Kane (England) header from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the top right corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway). Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross.

events.description: 凯恩射正。 萨卡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Morgan Rogers (England) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway). Assisted by Eberechi Eze.

events.description: 摩根·罗杰斯射正。 埃贝雷奇·埃兹参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Norway 1, England 2. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.

events.description: 贝林厄姆破门。 比分 1-2。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, Norway 1, England 1.
VAR Decision: No Penalty England.
Attempt blocked. Antonio Nusa (Norway) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Oscar Bobb.

events.description: 安东尼奥·努萨射门被封堵。 奥斯卡·鲍布参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Bukayo Saka.
Substitution, Norway. Jørgen Strand Larsen replaces Erling Haaland.

events.description: 乔根·斯特兰德·拉森替补登场，换下哈兰德。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, England. Eberechi Eze is caught offside.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Bukayo Saka.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射门偏出。 萨卡参与进攻。

player.name: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森

qualifiers.espnText: Bukayo Saka (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

qualifiers.espnText: Jude Bellingham (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Bukayo Saka (England).
Attempt missed. Patrick Berg (Norway) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Oscar Bobb.

events.description: 帕特里克·伯格射门偏出。 奥斯卡·鲍布参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway). Assisted by Harry Kane.

events.description: 萨卡射正。 凯恩参与进攻。

events.description: 丹·伯恩替补登场，换下贝林厄姆。

events.description: 安东尼奥·努萨射门被封堵。 桑德·伯格参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Norway. Conceded by Reece James.
Attempt missed. Oscar Bobb (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high following a corner.
Foul by Elliot Anderson (England).
Foul by Reece James (England).
Delay in match because of an injury Jordan Pickford (England).
Kristoffer Ajer (Norway) is shown the yellow card.

events.description: 克里斯托弗·阿耶尔吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, Norway. Antonio Nusa is caught offside.
Harry Kane's goal was disallowed for offside in first-half stoppage time.
qualifiers.source: FIFA Official Match Report + FIFA Official Timeline + ESPN Public Summary

events.description: 凯恩破门，但因越位进球被取消。比分仍为 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Torbjorn Heggem's goal was overturned after VAR identified Erling Haaland's foul on Elliot Anderson.
qualifiers.source: FIFA Official Match Report + FIFA Official Timeline + ESPN Public Summary

events.description: 托比昂·赫格姆破门，但因进攻阶段哈兰德对埃利奥特·安德森犯规，进球被取消。比分仍为 1-1。
